description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the openjdk:11-jdk Docker image. Define two stages, build and test, and set variables CMD_LINE_TOOLS_URL, GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY and SDK_MANAGER. Include a before_script that runs: apt-get -qq update --yes; apt-get -qq install --yes wget tar unzip lib32stdc++6 lib32z1 build-essential file; wget --quiet ${CMD_LINE_TOOLS_URL} -O tools.zip; unzip -qq tools.zip -d sdk-tools-linux; mkdir sdk-tools-linux/cmdline-tools/latest; mv sdk-tools-linux/cmdline-tools/* sdk-tools-linux/cmdline-tools/latest/ || true; yes | ${SDK_MANAGER} --licenses > /dev/null || true; ${SDK_MANAGER} --install ndk-bundle > /dev/null; yes | ${SDK_MANAGER} --licenses > /dev/null || true; export ANDROID_HOME=$PWD/sdk-tools-linux; export PATH=$PATH:$PWD/sdk-tools-linux/platform-tools/; chmod +x ./gradlew. Add a build job in the build stage that runs ./gradlew assembleDebug and publishes app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk as an artifact. Add a unitTests job in the test stage that runs ./gradlew test.
